original_question: What is the specific objective that the Commission must take into account when deciding whether to grant a financial contribution by the Community?

original_question: What is the effective date for increasing the quota amounts mentioned in point 2 of the excerpt?

enhanced_question: What type(s) of wheat are exempted from the applicable levy pursuant to Article 12(2) of this Regulation, as determined by the competent authority?

original_question: What is the effective date of entry into force for this Regulation?
enhanced_question: What is the date of application for this Regulation, as specified in Article [insert relevant article number] of the [insert relevant directive/regulation], and by which Member State(s) shall it be implemented?

original_question: What is the percentage by which customs duty is reduced for products originating from ACP/OCT countries?
enhanced_question: What percentage reduction in customs duty is applicable to goods originating from countries benefiting from the Agence de Coopération au Développement Economique (ACDE) or the Organisation des États du Comité du Sud (OCT), as referred to in Article 8(1)(a) of this Regulation, and what specific provisions govern the application of such reduction?
